description_long: This hamburger features a lightly toasted sesame seed bun with a golden-brown top. The filling includes a thick beef patty, a generous layer of melted cheddar cheese, crispy bacon strips, fresh green and purple lettuce, and several rings of raw red onion. The toppings are stacked in a visually appealing manner, with the cheese melting over the patty and bacon, and the lettuce and onions peeking out from the sides. The hamburger is presented on a dark wooden plate, which contrasts with the vibrant colors of the ingredients. The bun appears soft and slightly glossy, while the interior ingredients display a mix of textures from crisp to tender.
description: A sesame seed hamburger with bacon, cheddar cheese, lettuce, and onion, served on a dark wooden plate. The layers of toppings are colorful and visually appealing.
description_view_0: The hamburger is seen from a slight angle, highlighting the bacon, melted cheese, and a mix of green and purple lettuce spilling out from the side.
description_view_1: A direct front view shows the full roundness of the bun, with the bacon, cheese, lettuce, and onion rings clearly visible and evenly distributed.
description_view_2: This side view emphasizes the melted cheese and bacon, with the onion rings and lettuce peeking out from beneath the bun.
description_view_3: The hamburger is shown from another angle, focusing on the fresh lettuce and onion rings, with the bacon and cheese still prominent.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Lettuce and onion rings are layered beneath the patty, with melted cheddar cheese and bacon strips stacked above the patty and below the top bun. The toppings are distributed evenly, with some ingredients visibly protruding from the sides.
